channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: ChatGPT may be making us lonelier
item.description: A new pair of studies from MIT Media Lab and OpenAI found that those who use the chatbot most heavily also experience the most loneliness. The catch-22: it’s unclear whether this is caused by the chatbot itself or if lonely individuals are simply more likely to seek out emotional bonds.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Hang on handheld fans, we could be seeing AMD's FSR 4 upscaling on new handhelds after all - if this new RDNA 4 leak is legitimate
item.description: It's time to get excited again about the future of handheld gaming PCs, because a new leak suggests FSR 4 could be making its way to Medusa Point-powered devices.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Dating is even more partisan in the Trump era
item.description: Donald Trump’s return to office has bolstered a wave of apps. Bluesky spiked in November; Signal is seeing renewed attention. Niche dating apps are also raking in new users—both from the right and left. Americans are dating across party lines less and less.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Marvel sleuths think they've solved the case about Avengers: Doomsday's story, and it's all down to a single chair's shadow
item.description: Avengers 5's cast reveal livestream has spawned two new big Marvel fan theories about its plot and a popular character's return.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Hey listen! The live-action Legend of Zelda movie just got a 2027 release date confirmed by Sony and Nintendo
item.description: Sony and Nintendo set March 26, 2027 release date for the live-action film adaptation of The Legend of Zelda video game.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: These 5 new AI tools can help you do everything from managing tasks to improving your public speaking
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. Hundreds of AI tools emerge every week. I’ve picked five new ones worth exploring.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Solar grids could be hijacked and even potentially disabled by these security flaws
item.description: Several top solar invertor products were found to have vulnerabilities that could lead to device takeover.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: La Diputación de Girona optimiza el uso de sus recursos mediante la automatización
item.description: El Departamento de Intervención de la Diputación de Girona ha implementado de la mano de Atos un proyecto de automatización de procesos (RPA).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Windows 11’s latest patch declares war on BIOS updates for some Lenovo laptops, blocking them as a security risk in a bizarre turn of events
item.description: Can’t install a BIOS update for your Lenovo laptop? Blame Microsoft’s latest patch for Windows 11 – but fortunately the fix is simple enough.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nat sec officials discussion of 'clearly classified' information violated law, experts say
item.description: The inadvertent inclusion of a journalist on a Signal group chat discussing attack plans means officials likely violated the Espionage Act and public records laws while flouting guidance on how to discuss sensitive information.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: AI-Powered Drone Aims to Speed Up Wildfire Detection and Response
item.description: A new AI-based drone developed by Dryad Networks is designed to quickly detect, locate, and monitor wildfires using infrared images and other data.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The RACI matrix: Your blueprint for project success
item.description: Having managed and rescued dozens of projects, and helped others do so, I’ve noted that there is always one critical success factor (CSF) that has either been effectively addressed or missed/messed up: clarity around the roles and responsibilities for each project participant and key stakeholder.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nueve tendencias de CRM para 2025: la IA redefine la ecuación del cliente
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) tiene el potencial de transformar todos los aspectos de una empresa, pero sobre todo la gestión de las relaciones con los clientes (CRM), las funciones comerciales de cara al exterior de ventas, marketing y servicio al cliente.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: I wince at the prospect of the rumored Leica M11-V – here's why
item.description: The rumored camera will ditch the iconic rangefinder for a modern EVF, and may be lighter than most M-series models.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: G2 Names INE 2025 Cybersecurity Training Leader
item.description: INE, a global leader in networking and cybersecurity training and certifications, is proud to announce it is the recipient of twelve badges in G2’s Spring 2025 Report, including Grid Leader for Cybersecurity Professional Development, Online Course Providers, and Technical Skills Development, which h
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The slim phone era is (finally) back
item.description: Smartphones have been around long enough that, to the casual observer, their designs seem to have hit a plateau. And on a functional level, that’s more or less true—we’re all essentially holding the same six-inch-ish rectangle, aside from the occasional foldable exception.
item.dc:creator: Sam Byford, Fast Company

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts
item.description: The DOGE impact on federal cyber spending remains to be seen, but cyber program leaders are hoping to avoid any major cuts by emphasizing the ROI. The post Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Nineteen Rehabilitated Sea Turtles Released into Atlantic Ocean off Florida
item.description: Nineteen rehabilitated sea turtles released into Atlantic Ocean off Jacksonville, Florida, after suffering effects of cold water temperatures in New England.
item.dc:creator: Freida Frisaro, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Asus's more affordable version of Nvidia's uber-popular Project Digits snapped at GTC 2025
item.description: Ascent GX10 is Asus' version of Nvidia's DGX Spark, a compact AI supercomputer powered by Grace Blackwell GB10 Superchip.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Schumer, Democrats call for full, unredacted transcript of Signal attack chat
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.) and his Democratic colleagues are calling for a full, unredacted transcript of the Trump administration’s Signal group chat. “Yesterday’s revelations were alarming, but they were not enough.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: For Gen Z, viral videos are the new primetime
item.description: Gen Z isn’t just watching creators—they’re choosing them over traditional TV and movies. That’s the big takeaway from Deloitte’s 19th annual Digital Media Trends survey.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Canada bars Tesla from rebate program over Trump tariffs
item.description: Canada has barred electric vehicle (EV) giant Tesla from all of its rebate programs and banned the Texas-based automotive company from future electric vehicle rebate programs over President Trump’s tariff back-and-forth with Ottawa.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: White House taps Musk to investigate Signal chat mishap
item.description: The White House has asked Elon Musk and his team at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) to help investigate how a journalist was included on a Signal chat with national security officials.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The nation’s statisticians worry about the state of federal data gathering
item.description: One of the government's activities is the gathering of reliable statistics to guide policy and the quality of national statistics has become a concern. The post The nation’s statisticians worry about the state of federal data gathering first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Nvidia joins Trump onshoring push
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News
